name: realistic-medium
description: Stronger public memory benchmark dataset containing 20 conversations with 300 memory records and 120 questions across multiple categories.
fairness_notes: No memory passport, decay, or graph traversal assumptions.
Ensures balanced evaluation of vector and graph-based systems across 8 distinct domains.

memory_records.content: The active agent ID for software projects is designated as Agent-01.
The primary key indicator of success for the software task is achieving 95% accuracy.
The main supervisor for this software work stream is Mr. Arthur Pendelton.
The older instruction stated that files should be uploaded every 4 hours.
On June 15, the upload schedule was updated to every 1 hour to prevent data loss.
To register a new item in the software portal: 1. login, 2. enter ID, 3. click save.
Distractor: The login button on the portal is bright orange for high visibility.
The supervisor Pendelton works in Office 301, located in building B.
The department code for the software work is DEPT-01.
The first version of the budget for DEPT-01 was set to $50,000.
On June 18, the budget for DEPT-01 was updated to $65,000 for expansion.
Distractor: Department DEPT-01 has exactly 5 members currently.
The backup server hostname is backup-srv-01.local.
The primary contact person for verification is Dr. Elizabeth Swan.
Distractor: Dr. Swan has a master's degree in software operations.
